## Risk To Detect

Describe the security issue and why AI-built websites commonly miss it.

## Passive Detection Signal

What can SecureCheck detect from the browser without credentials, fuzzing, brute force, or state-changing requests?

## Suggested Severity

- [ ] P0 Critical
- [ ] P1 Warning
- [ ] P2 Advisory

## Suggested AI Fix Prompt

Draft the prompt a user could copy into Codex or another AI coding assistant.

## References

Add OWASP, CWE, browser, or platform documentation links.
